requirements.description: Extension compatibility closeout evidence must have an explicit contract so generic closeout freshness audits cannot silently pass contract_path=null artifacts.
Every child closeout entry must identify a Bead, record status=closed, result=pass, and name the focused evidence artifact or validation surface.
Every quality gate entry must include the exact command and a pass result.

This contract covers compatibility closeout freshness only; it does not authorize release, performance, capacity, strict drop-in, live service, Agent Mail, RCH, git, Beads mutation, or file deletion claims.
